description_long: This is a rectangular wooden filing cabinet with a rich, medium-brown wood grain finish. The front side features three horizontal drawers, each equipped with a simple, curved metal handle for easy access. The cabinet's surfaces are smooth and slightly glossy, reflecting light subtly and highlighting the natural wood pattern. The sides and back are plain, with no visible hardware or openings, emphasizing the solid construction. The overall design is functional and minimalistic, suitable for storing documents or office supplies. Its sturdy build and classic appearance make it ideal for use in professional or home office environments.
description: A medium-brown wooden filing cabinet with three drawers and curved metal handles, featuring a smooth, subtly glossy finish. The design is minimalistic and functional, suitable for office storage.
description_view_0: A plain wooden side of the cabinet, showing the natural wood grain with no visible handles or drawers.
description_view_1: A side view of the cabinet, revealing the edge of the drawers but no handles or detailed features.
description_view_2: The front of the cabinet, displaying three drawers with curved metal handles and a clear view of the wood grain.
description_view_3: The opposite side of the cabinet, similar to view 1, showing the edge of the drawers without handles.
